statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Microsoft Learn: SchedulingPolicy
links.summary: Microsoft documents official heterogeneous scheduling policy values for the power-policy SchedulingPolicy setting, including 3 = efficient processors. This confirms the feature area and adjacent value semantics, but it does not publish the kernel registry key DefaultDynamicHeteroCpuPolicy.

links.title: Repo system research notes for kernel registry values
links.summary: The repo documents DefaultDynamicHeteroCpuPolicy = 3 as personal research and lists the local 0..7 value meanings for the kernel variable.

links.title: nohuto mirror: dynamic heterogeneous CPU policy notes and kernel pseudocode
links.summary: The nohuto mirror documents DefaultDynamicHeteroCpuPolicy = 3 and the 0..7 family, and the kernel pseudocode shows KiDefaultHeteroCpuPolicy derived from KiDesiredHeteroCpuPolicy.

links.title: nohuto Session Manager quota-system trace
links.summary: Session-Manager.txt lists EnableCpuQuota under the Quota System block, separate from the kernel heterogeneous scheduling policy values.

links.title: nohuto trace for DefaultDynamicHeteroCpuPolicy
links.summary: The raw registry traces list \Registry\Machine\SYSTEM\ControlSet001\Control\Session Manager\Kernel : DefaultDynamicHeteroCpuPolicy across multiple builds, corroborating the exact kernel path and value name.

links.title: Strict VM sweep of DefaultDynamicHeteroCpuPolicy values 0..7
links.summary: The Win25H2Clean VM was swept through requested values 0..7 with two clean reboot cycles per sample. After each reboot the guest settled before a readback, and the benchmark value matched the requested value on boot 1, boot 2, and the benchmark pass for every sample. CPU timings stayed in a tight band and disk throughput varied without a monotonic trend across the requested values. The VM was restored to DefaultDynamicHeteroCpuPolicy = 3 after the sweep.
